mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM MEMBER WHERE STATUS = 'Y'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TRAVEL_LIST WHERE STATUS = 'Y'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM SCHEDULE_MAIN WHERE SCHEDULE_STATUS = 'Y'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM QLIST WHERE STATUS = 'Y'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM MEMBER
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TRAVEL_LIST WHERE VISIBILITY = 'PUBLIC'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM SCHEDULE_MAIN WHERE SCHEDULE_VISIBILITY = 'Y' and SCHEDULE_VISIBILITY = 'M'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM QLIST
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM REPLY WHERE STATUS = 'Y'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM REPORT WHERE REPORT_STATUS = 'N'
SELECT ID, NICKNAME, EMAIL, PHONE, ENROLL_DATE, STATUS FROM MEMBER WHERE ID != #{id} OFFSET #{startRow} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{listLimit} ROWS ONLY

SELECT S.SCHEDULE_NO AS postNo, '공유' AS boardType, S.SCHEDULE_TITLE AS title, M.NICKNAME AS nickname, S.CREATE_DATE AS createDate, S.SCHEDULE_STATUS AS status FROM SCHEDULE_MAIN S JOIN MEMBER M ON S.MEMBER_NO = M.MEMBER_NO WHERE S.SCHEDULE_VISIBILITY IN ('Y', 'M') ORDER BY S.CREATE_DATE DESC OFFSET #{startRow} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{listLimit} ROWS ONLY

SELECT T.TRAVEL_NO AS postNo, '후기' AS boardType, T.TRAVEL_TITLE AS title, M.NICKNAME AS nickname, T.CREATE_DATE AS createDate, T.STATUS AS status, S.TRAVEL_SUB_CONTENT AS content, S.CONTENT_TITLE AS contentTitle FROM TRAVEL_LIST T JOIN MEMBER M ON T.MEMBER_NO = M.MEMBER_NO LEFT JOIN TRAVEL_LIST_SUB S ON T.TRAVEL_NO = S.TRAVEL_NO ORDER BY T.CREATE_DATE DESC OFFSET #{startRow} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{listLimit} ROWS ONLY

SELECT Q.Q_NO AS postNo, '질문' AS boardType, Q.TITLE AS title, Q.CONTENT AS CONTENT, M.NICKNAME AS nickname, Q.CREATE_DATE AS createDate, Q.STATUS AS status FROM QLIST Q JOIN MEMBER M ON Q.MEMBER_NO = M.MEMBER_NO ORDER BY Q.CREATE_DATE DESC OFFSET #{startRow} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{listLimit} ROWS ONLY
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM notice

SELECT N.NOTICE_NO AS noticeNo, N.TITLE AS title, M.NICKNAME AS memberName, N.CREATE_DATE AS createDate, N.MODIFY_DATE AS modifyDate, N.STATUS AS status FROM NOTICE N JOIN MEMBER M ON N.MEMBER_NO = M.MEMBER_NO ORDER BY N.CREATE_DATE DESC OFFSET #{startRow} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{listLimit} ROWS ONLY
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO NOTICE (NOTICE_NO, TITLE, CONTENT, MEMBER_NO, CREATE_DATE, STATUS) VALUES (SEQ_NOTICE.NEXTVAL, #{title}, #{content}, #{memberNo}, SYSDATE, 'Y')
mapper.select: SELECT N.NOTICE_NO AS noticeNo, N.TITLE AS title, N.CONTENT AS content, M.NICKNAME AS memberName, N.CREATE_DATE AS createDate, N.MODIFY_DATE AS modifyDate, N.STATUS AS status FROM NOTICE N JOIN MEMBER M ON N.MEMBER_NO = M.MEMBER_NO WHERE N.NOTICE_NO = #{noticeNo}
mapper.update: UPDATE NOTICE SET TITLE = #{title}, CONTENT = #{content}, MODIFY_DATE = SYSDATE WHERE NOTICE_NO = #{noticeNo}
mapper.select: SELECT N.NOTICE_NO, N.TITLE, N.CREATE_DATE, M.NICKNAME AS MEMBER_NAME FROM NOTICE N JOIN MEMBER M ON N.MEMBER_NO = M.MEMBER_NO WHERE N.STATUS = 'Y' ORDER BY N.NOTICE_NO DESC

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM REPORT WHERE 1=1
AND TARGET_TYPE = 'reply'
AND TARGET_TYPE IN ('travel', 'question')
AND REPORT_STATUS = #{status}

choose.when: UPDATE TRAVEL_LIST SET STATUS = 'N' WHERE TRAVEL_NO = #{targetNo}
UPDATE QLIST SET STATUS = 'N' WHERE Q_NO = #{targetNo}
UPDATE REPLY SET STATUS = 'N' WHERE REPLY_NO = #{targetNo}
